displayName: United Arab Emirates – Student Residence Visa
shortDescription: KHDA / SPEA / ADEK · University sponsorship · Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi · India route

policyAlert.summary: Student visa requires licensed institution sponsorship. Confirm emirate authority (GDRFA Dubai, Sharjah, Abu Dhabi) before quoting fees.

alert.title: Licensed institution + emirate authority
alert.body: Verify university/college is licensed in the target emirate (KHDA Dubai, SPEA Sharjah, ADEK Abu Dhabi). Unlicensed agents or TR-only offers are a compliance risk.

about.label: Description
about.value: Student residence visa for full-time study at a UAE-licensed university or college in Dubai, Sharjah, or Abu Dhabi. Institution acts as sponsor; entry permit issued from India, then Emirates ID and residence stamping after arrival and medical.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Unconditional admission from licensed institution · Tuition/deposit paid per offer · Passport 6+ months validity · Medical fitness · Security clearance · Indian documents attested (MOFA UAE where required)

about.label: Emirate authorities
about.value: Dubai: GDRFA Dubai + KHDA · Sharjah: GDRFA Sharjah + SPEA · Abu Dhabi: ICP / ADEK — route depends on campus location

about.label: Proof of funds
about.value: Tuition payment receipt + living support per institution guidelines; sponsor may require bank statements or sponsor undertaking.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: ICP UAE (u.ae/en/icp) · GDRFA (emirate) · VFS Global UAE India · Licensed university/college

about.label: After approval
about.value: Enter UAE on entry permit; complete medical; apply Emirates ID; residence visa stamping; register with institution. Part-time work may require university NOC (typically max 15 hrs/week in term).

eligibility.criterion: Indian documents attested (MOFA UAE as required)

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, address sponsor file gaps before rebooking. Never use unlicensed institutions or visa runners.

redFlags.title: Unlicensed college or fake admission
redFlags.fix: Verify license on official emirate education portal before fees

redFlags.title: Tuition not paid before visa
redFlags.description: Sponsor cannot proceed without payment proof.
redFlags.fix: Collect university receipt matching offer letter

redFlags.title: Wrong emirate authority
redFlags.description: Dubai file submitted for Sharjah campus.
redFlags.fix: Match GDRFA/ICP to physical campus emirate

redFlags.title: Attestation incomplete
redFlags.fix: MEA → UAE Embassy India → MOFA UAE chain

redFlags.title: Emirates ID delay
redFlags.description: Student did not complete medical/ID after arrival.
redFlags.fix: Institution PRO timeline — complete within 30 days

redFlags.title: Prior UAE overstay
redFlags.fix: GDRFA history check; disclose and remediate fines

faqs.q: Can we guarantee UAE student visa approval?
faqs.a: No. GDRFA/ICP decides based on sponsor file and security checks. Never promise approval.

faqs.q: Which emirate authority for Dubai students?
faqs.a: GDRFA Dubai with KHDA-licensed institution sponsorship.

faqs.q: Can students work part-time?
faqs.a: Limited part-time work with university NOC — verify current MOHRE rules; not full-time employment.

faqs.q: How to apply from India?
faqs.a: Institution-sponsored entry permit via GDRFA/ICP channels; VFS or embassy attestation for documents as required.

faqs.q: What after arrival?
faqs.a: Medical test, Emirates ID biometrics, residence visa stamping, university registration.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Student residence visa for full-time study at a UAE-licensed university or college in Dubai, Sharjah, or Abu Dhabi. Institution acts as sponsor; entry permit issued from India, then Emirates ID and residence stamping after arrival and medical.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Unconditional admission from licensed institution · Tuition/deposit paid per offer · Passport 6+ months validity · Medical fitness · Security clearance · Indian documents attested (MOFA UAE where required)

faqs.q: What is Emirate authorities for this service?
faqs.a: Dubai: GDRFA Dubai + KHDA · Sharjah: GDRFA Sharjah + SPEA · Abu Dhabi: ICP / ADEK — route depends on campus location

faqs.q: What is Proof of funds for this service?
faqs.a: Tuition payment receipt + living support per institution guidelines; sponsor may require bank statements or sponsor undertaking.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: ICP UAE (u.ae/en/icp) · GDRFA (emirate) · VFS Global UAE India · Licensed university/college

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Enter UAE on entry permit; complete medical; apply Emirates ID; residence visa stamping; register with institution. Part-time work may require university NOC (typically max 15 hrs/week in term).

faqs.q: Is Admission from KHDA/SPEA/ADEK-licensed institution required?
faqs.a: Admission from KHDA/SPEA/ADEK-licensed institution is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Tuition deposit or payment receipt required?
faqs.a: Required before visa processing

faqs.q: Is Passport valid 6+ months required?
faqs.a: Passport valid 6+ months is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Indian documents attested (MOFA UAE as required) required?
faqs.a: Allow 2–4 weeks

faqs.q: Is Medical fitness test (UAE-approved) required?
faqs.a: After arrival or as directed

faqs.q: Is Institution visa processing fee paid required?
faqs.a: Institution visa processing fee paid is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Security clearance / GDRFA approval required?
faqs.a: Institution submits

faqs.q: Is Accommodation proof in UAE required?
faqs.a: Accommodation proof in UAE is typically required.

faqs.q: Can Future Link guarantee approval?
faqs.a: No. Government authorities decide each case. Never promise approval.

faqs.q: What documents should we collect first?
faqs.a: Passport, application forms, fees, and the service checklist in the Checklist tab.

faqs.q: How long does processing take?
faqs.a: See KPI processing time — always verify current GDRFA/ICP timelines before quoting.

faqs.q: What are government fees?
faqs.a: Confirm latest fees on the official portal in the Resources section before quoting.

faqs.q: Can the client apply from India?
faqs.a: Yes — standard route for Indian nationals via sponsor, VFS, or ICP e-visa as applicable.

faqs.q: What if the client was refused before?
faqs.a: Disclose all refusals, overstays, and bans; address GDRFA fines before reapply.

faqs.q: Can the client work on this visa?
faqs.a: Work rights depend on visa type — employment visa required for full-time work.

faqs.q: United Arab Emirates – Student Residence Visa: counselor verification point 27?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: United Arab Emirates – Student Residence Visa: counselor verification point 28?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: United Arab Emirates – Student Residence Visa: counselor verification point 29?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: United Arab Emirates – Student Residence Visa: counselor verification point 30?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Verify licensed institution or employer before collecting full fees
proTips: Confirm campus emirate before quoting GDRFA fees
Start MOFA attestation when offer letter arrives
Use institution PRO for filing — avoid freelance visa runners
Warn clients: UAE student visa is not a work permit
postApproval: Complete medical and Emirates ID within institution timeline
Register for orientation on first week
Discuss dependent visa separately if spouse plans to join

timeline.title: Offer letter, tuition payment, attestation start
Entry permit issued — travel to UAE

admission documentation + admission + proof of funds

Leave in 1 week
quiz.explanation: Anmeldung and GDRFA / ICP required.

quiz.question: Englishy – Student Visa (National Visa): what is true regarding Eligible applicants?

UAE Embassy/Consulate in India · ICP UAE / GDRFA (emirate) · Local GDRFA / ICP after arrival
quiz.explanation: Unconditional admission from licensed UAE institution or conditional admission · Proof of funds or scholarship · MOFA-attested academic documents · Health insurance · Motivation letter
